# Skill: Static Site Review

## Use When

Use this skill before finishing larger website changes.

## Review Checklist

- Pages load without obvious errors.
- Navigation works on root and nested pages.
- Mobile sidebar toggle works.
- Active nav state is correct.
- Relative links are valid.
- Images resolve correctly.
- Metadata JSON is valid.
- Heading hierarchy is logical.
- Meaningful images have useful alt text.
- No unnecessary dependency was added.
- No duplicate layout markup was introduced.

## Final Response

Summarize:

- checks completed
- issues found
- recommended follow-ups
